recent_excerpts: Cryptography experts warn that migrating to post-quantum cryptography will take years, urging organizations to begin quantum risk management now to protect encrypted data from future 'Q-Day' harvest-n
The Apache Software Foundation patched a critical vulnerability in Tomcat's EncryptInterceptor that could allow attackers to bypass encryption and view sensitive data. Immediate updates are required.
Google has extended Gmail's client-side encryption to Android and iOS, enabling enterprise users to handle sensitive data on mobile devices without third-party apps.
